title: Senior Revenue Manager at Oberoi Hotels

jsonLd.title: Senior Revenue Manager at Oberoi Hotels
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Oberoi Hotels! We are hiring a Revenue Manager for our Agra team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Oberoi Hotels:
Oberoi Hotels is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Front Office

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oberoi Hotels!
